title: Camerapture
description: Take pictures using a working camera, show them to other players and hang them on your wall in picture frames!
body:
# Camerapture

![Screenshot of a coastline, with a camera border](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9dzLWnmZ/images/0e38e84378560b6880174ad9d41d8d409e5eef54.png)

> Check the Gallery tab for more screenshots!

Camerapture is a camera / picture mod for Fabric! It adds working cameras that can take actual pictures of what you see in-game. You can also upload custom pictures using the camera! These pictures can be shared with other players and hung up on the wall to be viewed by everyone.

## How does it work?

![Crafting recipe of the Camera item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce06a0bffcbce2dba73ec0a084073ceb902e46f9.png)

After crafting your camera, put some paper in your inventory and get to photographing!

You can hang a picture on the wall by sneak + right-clicking. To resize the picture frame, just sneak + right-click again on the picture!

![Crafting recipe of the Album item](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/030a1ad3c8ff48e63a8d2ea4a0474fb651cfa4d0.png)

Alternatively, craft an album and collect your pictures into a single book!

## Credits
- henkelmax for making the [Camera Mod for Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/camera-mod) that's used on the QSMP, for being the main inspiration of this mod.
- All the great people on our origins server for being amazing and patient with me <3
